name: opencode.json — Config File
description: opencode.json configures providers, models, and behavior for OpenCode.

name: AGENTS.md — Agent Instructions
description: AGENTS.md provides persistent context to OpenCode sessions.
content:
# OpenCode Agent Instructions

## Commands
- Install: pnpm install
- Dev: pnpm dev
- Test: pnpm test

## Rules
- TypeScript strict
- Run tests before finishing
- Small focused commits
- Don't modify unrelated files
